summary: The redacted-real trace records a Proof 013 gate-repair sequence: initial malformed request, corrected hard gate, server restarts from Belief Ledger commits 22b5839 and 1c89d45, candidate-risk gate pass, and pond-backed advisory pressure calls for contradiction mapping, omitted-range recovery, replay adequacy, and claim-boundary audit.
compression_boundary: Visible replay sees the summarized task/correction sequence; full-lineage replay may inspect fixture refs, tool result hashes, runtime hashes, authority refs, environment refs, and recovery trace.
